title: mastixia pentandra subsp. scortechinii
intro: Mastixia pentandra subsp. scortechinii, also known as Borneo Mastixia, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, specifically in the Borneo region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Mastixia pentandra subsp. scortechinii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of decoctions and infusions.
